---
title: "BBB 26 — Painel de Reações"
subtitle: "Análise estratégica do Big Brother Brasil 2026 — reações, relações, votos e dinâmicas de poder"
description: "Análise estratégica do Big Brother Brasil 2026 — reações, relações, votos e dinâmicas de poder"
lang: pt-BR
format:
  html:
    code-tools: false
    css:
      - assets/index.css
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
---

```{python}
#| label: setup
#| include: false

from pathlib import Path
from datetime import datetime, timedelta, timezone
from functools import partial

import sys
sys.path.append(str(Path("scripts").resolve()))
from data_utils import (
    require_clean_manual_events, setup_bbb_dark_theme,
    load_paredoes_raw, load_paredoes_transformed,
    load_votalhada_polls, get_poll_for_paredao,
    load_index_data, load_game_timeline,
    avatar_html as _avatar_html,
    REACTION_EMOJI, REACTION_SLUG_TO_LABEL, SENTIMENT_WEIGHTS,
    POSITIVE, MILD_NEGATIVE, STRONG_NEGATIVE, GROUP_COLORS,
    POWER_EVENT_EMOJI, POWER_EVENT_LABELS,
    ANALYSIS_DESCRIPTIONS, render_cronologia_html,
)
from paredao_viz import (
    build_paredao_card_payload,
    build_paredao_history,
    render_paredao_index_card,
)
from builders.index_data_builder import POWER_TAG_LABELS
from index_viz import (
    av as _av,
    av_group_border as _av_group_border,
    build_rxn_detail_html,
    card_header,
    COMP_LABELS,
    days_ago_str as _days_ago_str,
    fmt_date_br,
    make_cross_table_html,
    make_event_chips as _make_event_chips,
    make_reaction_summary_html,
    pair_story_card as _pair_story_card,
    render_dramatic_event_row as _render_dramatic_event_row,
    render_actor_avatars as _render_actor_avatars,
    render_avatar_row as _render_avatar_row,
    render_blindado_row as _render_blindado_row,
    render_break_row as _render_break_row,
    render_overflow_toggle as _render_overflow_toggle,
    render_pair_chip,
    render_podiums_lane as _render_podiums_lane,
    render_pulso_card,
    render_viradas_card,
    render_profile_card,
    render_profile_sinc_row,
    render_pulse_row,
    render_ranked_lane as _render_ranked_lane,
    render_saldo_card,
    plant_color,
    render_status_chip,
    SOURCE_ICONS,
    stat_chip,
    render_toggle_pair_lane as _render_toggle_pair_lane,
    render_na_mira_row as _render_na_mira_row,
    render_agressor_row as _render_agressor_row,
    render_vx_row as _render_vx_row,
    value_color,
)

require_clean_manual_events()
setup_bbb_dark_theme()

```

```{python}
#| label: load-data

index_data = load_index_data()

if not index_data:
    raise RuntimeError("index_data.json não encontrado. Execute scripts/build_derived_data.py")

latest = index_data.get("latest", {})
MEMBER_OF = index_data.get("member_of", {})
AVATARS = index_data.get("avatars", {})
av = partial(_av, avatars=AVATARS, avatar_html=_avatar_html)
av_group_border = partial(_av_group_border, member_of=MEMBER_OF)
pair_story_card = partial(_pair_story_card, avatar_fn=av, group_border_fn=av_group_border)
PAREDOES_RAW = load_paredoes_raw().get("paredoes", [])
PAREDOES_TRANSFORMED = load_paredoes_transformed(member_of=MEMBER_OF)
PAREDAO_ATUAL = PAREDOES_TRANSFORMED[-1] if PAREDOES_TRANSFORMED else None
# If current paredão has no nominees, show last finalized result
if PAREDAO_ATUAL and not PAREDAO_ATUAL.get("participantes") and len(PAREDOES_TRANSFORMED) >= 2:
    _last_fin = next((p for p in reversed(PAREDOES_TRANSFORMED[:-1]) if p.get("status") == "finalizado"), None)
    if _last_fin:
        PAREDAO_ATUAL = _last_fin
VOTALHADA_POLLS = load_votalhada_polls()

meta_generated_at = index_data.get("_metadata", {}).get("generated_at")
try:
    _gen_dt = datetime.fromisoformat(str(meta_generated_at).replace("Z", "+00:00"))
    DATA_GENERATED_DATE_BRT = _gen_dt.astimezone(timezone(timedelta(hours=-3))).date()
except Exception:
    DATA_GENERATED_DATE_BRT = datetime.now(timezone(timedelta(hours=-3))).date()

days_ago_str = partial(_days_ago_str, anchor_brt=DATA_GENERATED_DATE_BRT)
```

```{python}
#| label: viz-functions
#| include: false
```

# Cronologia do Jogo {#cronologia-jogo}

Linha do tempo dos eventos da temporada — próximos eventos e histórico recente.

```{python}
#| label: timeline-events-index
#| output: asis

timeline_events = load_game_timeline().get("events", [])
if timeline_events:
    print(render_cronologia_html(timeline_events))
else:
    print("<p class='text-muted'>Nenhum evento na cronologia.</p>")
```

```{python}
#| label: compute-highlights
#| output: asis

date_display_pt = index_data.get("highlights", {}).get("date_display", "")
hl_cards = index_data.get("highlights", {}).get("cards", [])

CARD_STORY_ORDER = {
    "context": 0,
    "paredao": 5,
    "ranking": 10,
    "changes": 20,
    "viradas": 30,
    "dramatic": 40,
    "hostilities": 50,
    "sincerao": 50,
    "breaks": 70,
    "blindados": 80,
    "visados": 85,
    "nunca_paredao": 87,
    "figurinha_repetida": 88,
    "impact": 90,
    "positive_impact": 100,
    "vulnerability": 110,
    "mais_agressor": 130,
    "vip": 140,
    "xepa": 150,
}
hl_cards = sorted(hl_cards, key=lambda c: CARD_STORY_ORDER.get(c.get("type"), 999))

if not hl_cards:
    print(f'''<div class="dark-card tc u-s468">
📅 Primeiro dia de dados — sem comparações disponíveis ainda.</div>''')
else:
    # Extract context card data for the header
    ctx = next((c for c in hl_cards if c.get("type") == "context"), {})
    ctx_cycle = ctx.get("cycle", "?")
    ctx_days = ctx.get("days", 0)
    ctx_active = ctx.get("active", 0)

    # Section header with context stats
    print(f'''<div class="u-s442">
<h2 class="fs-2xl u-s435">📋 Destaques do Dia <span class="fs-base u-s250">({date_display_pt})</span></h2>
<div class="u-s399"></div>
<div class="fs-base u-s365">
<span>📅 <b class="text-light">Ciclo do Paredão {ctx_cycle}</b></span>
<span>{ctx_days} dias de dados</span>
<span>{ctx_active} participantes ativos</span>
</div>
</div>''')

    print('<div class="u-s371">')

    for card in hl_cards:
        ctype = card.get("type")
        color = card.get("color", "#555")

        # ── 🏆 Ranking ──
        if ctype == "ranking":
            leader = card["leader"]
            streak = card.get("streak", 1)
            streak_txt = f"{streak}º dia consecutivo" if streak > 1 else "hoje"
            podium = card.get("podium", [])
            bottom3 = card.get("bottom3", [])
            podium_all = card.get("podium_all") or podium
            bottom_all = card.get("bottom_all") or bottom3
            delta_all = card.get("delta_all", [])
            mup = card.get("movers_up")
            mdown = card.get("movers_down")
            movers_label = card.get("movers_label", "📅 Variação vs ontem")

            header = card_header(
                card["icon"], card["title"], card.get("link"), streak_txt,
                source_tag="📸 Queridômetro hoje",
                subtitle="Score de hoje (❤️ = +1, negativas = −0.5 a −1). Dado do dia, não acumulado."
            )

            # ── Top (main layout + in-card toggle) ──
            medals = ["🥇", "🥈", "🥉", "4º", "5º"]
            podium_positive = [p for p in podium_all if p["score"] > 0]
            inline_podium = podium_positive[:5]
            overflow_podium = podium_positive[5:]
            podium_html = '<div>'
            podium_html += '<div class="fs-2xs u-s060">⬆ Mais queridos</div>'
            podium_html += '<div class="u-s065">'
            for i, p in enumerate(inline_podium):
                name = p["name"]
                score = p["score"]
                label = medals[i] if i < len(medals) else f"{i+1}º"
                podium_html += (
                    f'<div class="u-s344">'
                    f'{av(name, 42, "#27ae60")}'
                    f'<span class="fs-md u-s026">{label} {name.split()[0]} {score:+.1f}</span>'
                    f'</div>'
                )
            podium_html += '</div>'
            if overflow_podium:
                podium_html += _render_overflow_toggle(len(overflow_podium))
                podium_html += '<div class="u-s065">'
                for i, p in enumerate(overflow_podium, start=len(inline_podium) + 1):
                    name = p["name"]
                    score = p["score"]
                    podium_html += (
                        f'<div class="u-s344">'
                        f'{av(name, 42, "#27ae60")}'
                        f'<span class="fs-md u-s026">{i}º {name.split()[0]} {score:+.1f}</span>'
                        f'</div>'
                    )
                podium_html += '</div></details>'
            podium_html += '</div>'

            # ── Bottom (main layout + in-card toggle) ──
            bottom_html = ""
            if bottom_all:
                bottom_negative = [p for p in bottom_all if p["score"] < 0]
                inline_bottom = bottom_negative[:6]
                overflow_bottom = bottom_negative[6:]
                if inline_bottom:
                    bottom_html = '<div>'
                    bottom_html += '<div class="fs-2xs u-s060">⬇ Menos queridos</div>'
                    bottom_html += '<div class="u-s065">'
                    for p in inline_bottom:
                        name = p["name"]
                        score = p["score"]
                        score_color = value_color(score, "signed")
                        bottom_html += (
                            f'<div class="u-s340">'
                            f'{av(name, 42, "#e74c3c")}'
                            f'<span class="fs-md" style="color:{score_color};font-weight:700;">⬇ {name.split()[0]} {score:+.1f}</span>'
                            f'</div>'
                        )
                    bottom_html += '</div>'
                    if overflow_bottom:
                        bottom_html += _render_overflow_toggle(len(overflow_bottom))
                        bottom_html += '<div class="u-s065">'
                        for p in overflow_bottom:
                            name = p["name"]
                            score = p["score"]
                            score_color = value_color(score, "signed")
                            bottom_html += (
                                f'<div class="u-s340">'
                                f'{av(name, 42, "#e74c3c")}'
                                f'<span class="fs-md" style="color:{score_color};font-weight:700;">⬇ {name.split()[0]} {score:+.1f}</span>'
                                f'</div>'
                            )
                        bottom_html += '</div></details>'
                    bottom_html += '</div>'

            # ── Movers (main layout + in-card toggle) ──
            movers_html = ""
            mup_list = mup if isinstance(mup, list) else ([mup] if mup else [])
            mdown_list = mdown if isinstance(mdown, list) else ([mdown] if mdown else [])
            inline_deltas = []
            if mup_list or mdown_list:
                inline_deltas = [{"name": d["name"], "delta": d["delta"]} for d in mup_list + mdown_list]
            elif delta_all:
                inline_deltas = delta_all[:6]
            if inline_deltas:
                inline_names = {d["name"] for d in inline_deltas}
                overflow_deltas = [d for d in delta_all if d.get("name") not in inline_names]
                movers_html = '<div>'
                movers_html += f'<div class="fs-2xs u-s060">{movers_label}</div>'
                movers_html += '<div class="u-s065">'
                for d in inline_deltas:
                    is_up = d.get("delta", 0) >= 0
                    name = d["name"]
                    icon = "📈" if is_up else "📉"
                    row_cls = "u-s345" if is_up else "u-s341"
                    text_cls = "fs-md u-s026" if is_up else "text-neg fs-md"
                    border = "#27ae60" if is_up else "#e74c3c"
                    movers_html += (
                        f'<div class="{row_cls}">'
                        f'{av(name, 42, border)}'
                        f'<span class="{text_cls}">{icon} {name.split()[0]} {d["delta"]:+.1f}</span>'
                        f'</div>'
                    )
                movers_html += '</div>'
                if overflow_deltas:
                    movers_html += _render_overflow_toggle(len(overflow_deltas))
                    movers_html += '<div class="u-s065">'
                    for d in overflow_deltas:
                        is_up = d.get("delta", 0) >= 0
                        name = d["name"]
                        icon = "📈" if is_up else "📉"
                        row_cls = "u-s345" if is_up else "u-s341"
                        text_cls = "fs-md u-s026" if is_up else "text-neg fs-md"
                        border = "#27ae60" if is_up else "#e74c3c"
                        movers_html += (
                            f'<div class="{row_cls}">'
                            f'{av(name, 42, border)}'
                            f'<span class="{text_cls}">{icon} {name.split()[0]} {d["delta"]:+.1f}</span>'
                            f'</div>'
                        )
                    movers_html += '</div></details>'
                movers_html += '</div>'

            # 3-column grid on desktop, stacks on mobile
            print(f'''<div class="dark-card ranking-highlight-card" style="grid-column:1/-1;border-top:4px solid {color};padding:1rem 1.2rem;">
{header}
<div class="u-s370">
{podium_html}
{bottom_html}
{movers_html}
</div>
</div>''')

        # ── 📊 Changes ──
        elif ctype == "changes":
            print(render_pulso_card(card, avatar_fn=av))

        # ── 🔄 Viradas ──
        elif ctype == "viradas":
            print(render_viradas_card(card, avatar_fn=av))

        # ── 🔥 Sincerão (unified: radar + contradictions) ──
        elif ctype == "sincerao":
            radar = card.get("radar", {})
            contras = card.get("contradictions", [])
            aligned_neg = card.get("aligned_neg", [])
            fmt = card.get("format", "")
            reaction_reference_date = card.get("reaction_reference_date")
            neg_ranked = radar.get("neg_ranked", [])
            neg_lanes = radar.get("neg_lanes", [])
            pos_ranked = radar.get("pos_ranked", [])
            not_targeted = radar.get("not_targeted", [])
            custom_neg_label = radar.get("neg_label")
            custom_neg_emoji = radar.get("neg_emoji")
            podiums_data = card.get("podiums")

            INLINE_MAX_RANKED = 4
            INLINE_MAX_PAIRS = 3

            subtitle = fmt if fmt else "Resumo semanal do Sincerão × Queridômetro."
            if reaction_reference_date:
                try:
                    reaction_ref_pt = datetime.strptime(reaction_reference_date, "%Y-%m-%d").strftime("%d/%m")
                except Exception:
                    reaction_ref_pt = reaction_reference_date
                subtitle = f"{subtitle} Reações de referência: {reaction_ref_pt}."

            # Negative lane: use custom label when all edges are the same type (e.g., "Não Ganha")
            _neg_title = custom_neg_label or "Atacados"
            _neg_icon = custom_neg_emoji or "💣"

            lanes = []
            if neg_lanes:
                lanes.extend(
                    _render_ranked_lane(
                        lane.get("label", _neg_title),
                        _neg_icon,
                        lane.get("ranked", []),
                        "Sem ataques na semana.",
                        "attack",
                        inline_max=INLINE_MAX_RANKED,
                        avatar_html_fn=_avatar_html,
                        avatars=AVATARS,
                        avatar_size=30,
                    )
                    for lane in neg_lanes
                )
            else:
                lanes = [
                    _render_ranked_lane(
                        _neg_title,
                        _neg_icon,
                        neg_ranked,
                        "Sem ataques na semana.",
                        "attack",
                        inline_max=INLINE_MAX_RANKED,
                        avatar_html_fn=_avatar_html,
                        avatars=AVATARS,
                        avatar_size=30,
                    ),
                ]

            # Podium view (when format is pódio-based) or generic "Elogiados"
            if podiums_data:
                lanes.append(
                    _render_podiums_lane(
                        podiums_data,
                        avatar_html_fn=_avatar_html,
                        avatars=AVATARS,
                        avatar_size=30,
                    )
                )
            elif pos_ranked:
                lanes.append(
                    _render_ranked_lane(
                        "Elogiados",
                        "🏆",
                        pos_ranked,
                        "Sem elogios na semana.",
                        "praise",
                        inline_max=INLINE_MAX_RANKED,
                        avatar_html_fn=_avatar_html,
                        avatars=AVATARS,
                        avatar_size=30,
                    )
                )

            safe_ranked = [{"name": n, "count": 0} for n in not_targeted]
            # In podium format, not being mentioned is negative (invisible);
            # in attack formats, not being targeted is positive (spared).
            if podiums_data:
                _safe_title = "Sem Menção"
                _safe_icon = "👻"
                _safe_empty = "Todos apareceram em algum pódio ou 'não ganha'."
            else:
                _safe_title = "Poupados"
                _safe_icon = "🛡️"
                _safe_empty = "Ninguém ficou poupado na semana."
            lanes.append(
                _render_ranked_lane(
                    _safe_title,
                    _safe_icon,
                    safe_ranked,
                    _safe_empty,
                    "safe",
                    inline_max=INLINE_MAX_RANKED,
                    avatar_html_fn=_avatar_html,
                    avatars=AVATARS,
                    avatar_size=30,
                    highlight_top=False,
                    force_count=0,
                )
            )

            toggle_sections = [
                _render_toggle_pair_lane(
                    "Contradições",
                    "⚡",
                    contras,
                    "contra",
                    inline_max=INLINE_MAX_PAIRS,
                    render_pair_chip_fn=render_pair_chip,
                ),
                _render_toggle_pair_lane(
                    "Conflito Confirmado",
                    "🎯",
                    aligned_neg,
                    "aligned",
                    inline_max=INLINE_MAX_PAIRS,
                    render_pair_chip_fn=render_pair_chip,
                ),
            ]
            body_html = f'<div class="sinc-card" data-sinc-sync-card>{"".join(lanes)}{"".join(toggle_sections)}</div>'
            count_txt = f"{len(neg_ranked) + len(pos_ranked)}" if (neg_ranked or pos_ranked) else ""

            print(f'''<div class="info-panel" style="border-left-color:{color};">
{card_header(card["icon"], card["title"], card.get("link"), count_txt, source_tag="📸 Sincerão", subtitle=subtitle)}
{body_html}
</div>''')

        # ── 🗳️ Paredão ──
        elif ctype == "paredao":
            payload = card.get("payload") or {}
            if PAREDAO_ATUAL:
                _pa_numero = PAREDAO_ATUAL.get("numero")
                _pa_history = build_paredao_history(PAREDOES_RAW, _pa_numero)
                _pa_poll = get_poll_for_paredao(VOTALHADA_POLLS, _pa_numero)
                payload = build_paredao_card_payload(PAREDAO_ATUAL, _pa_poll, VOTALHADA_POLLS, _pa_history)
            status_badge = payload.get("status_label", "Em votação")
            print(f'''<div class="info-panel highlight-card-span-3" style="border-left-color:{color};">
{card_header(card["icon"], card["title"], card.get("link"), status_badge, source_tag="📊 Nosso Modelo", subtitle=card.get("subtitle", "Leitura atual do paredão; quando fechar, o card troca para o resultado oficial."))}
{render_paredao_index_card(payload, AVATARS)}
</div>''')

        # ── ⚔️ Mais Agressor ──
        elif ctype == "mais_agressor":
            items_all = card.get("items_all") or card.get("items", [])
            items_exited = card.get("items_exited", [])
            total = card.get("total", len(items_all))
            inline_items = items_all[:5]
            overflow_items = items_all[5:]
            max_hits = max((it.get("power_hits", 0) for it in items_all), default=1) or 1

            rows_html = '<div class="u-s058">'
            rows_html += "".join(
                _render_agressor_row(it, max_hits=max_hits, avatar_fn=av, tag_labels=POWER_TAG_LABELS)
                for it in inline_items
            )
            if overflow_items:
                rows_html += (
                    f'<details class="sinc-more">'
                    f'<summary>+{len(overflow_items)} restantes</summary>'
                    f'<div class="u-s058">{"".join(_render_agressor_row(it, max_hits=max_hits, avatar_fn=av, tag_labels=POWER_TAG_LABELS) for it in overflow_items)}</div>'
                    f'</details>'
                )
            if items_exited:
                rows_html += (
                    f'<details class="sinc-more" style="margin-top:8px;padding-top:8px;border-top:1px solid #333;">'
                    f'<summary>Mostrar eliminados ({len(items_exited)})</summary>'
                    f'<div class="u-s058">{"".join(_render_agressor_row(it, max_hits=max_hits, avatar_fn=av, tag_labels=POWER_TAG_LABELS) for it in items_exited)}</div>'
                    f'</details>'
                )
            rows_html += '</div>'
            print(f'''<div class="info-panel" style="border-left-color:{color};">
{card_header(card["icon"], card["title"], card.get("link"), f"{total} ativos", source_tag="📈 Acumulado", subtitle="Quem mais fez indicações, monstros, vetos e outros ataques deliberados.")}
{rows_html}
</div>''')

        # ── 🔴 Vulnerability ──
        elif ctype == "vulnerability":
            items = card.get("items", [])
            items_all = card.get("items_all") or items
            total = card.get("total", len(items))
            inline_items = items_all[:4]
            overflow_items = items_all[4:]
            rows_html = '<div class="u-s058">'
            for it in inline_items:
                name = it["name"]
                count = it["count"]
                level = it.get("level", "warning")
                enemies = it.get("enemies", [])
                level_color = "#e74c3c" if level == "critical" else "#f39c12"
                level_label = "MUITO VULNERÁVEL" if level == "critical" else "VULNERÁVEL"
                enemy_avatars = ''.join(av(e, 34, level_color) for e in enemies[:4])
                extra_enemies = len(enemies) - 4
                rows_html += (
                    f'<div class="u-s348">'
                    f'{av(name, 42, level_color)}'
                    f'<div class="u-s066">'
                    f'<div class="u-s347">'
                    f'<span class="fs-base u-s068">{name.split()[0]}</span>'
                    f'<span class="fs-2xs" style="padding:2px 6px;border-radius:4px;background:{level_color};color:#fff;font-weight:700;">{level_label}</span>'
                    f'<span class="fs-sm" style="color:{level_color};font-weight:600;">{count} falsos amigos</span>'
                    f'</div>'
                    f'<div class="u-s366">'
                    f'<span class="fs-2xs u-s251">Quem:</span>'
                    f'{enemy_avatars}'
                    f'{f"<span class=&quot;fs-2xs&quot; style=&quot;color:#888;&quot;>+{extra_enemies}</span>" if extra_enemies > 0 else ""}'
                    f'</div></div></div>'
                )
            if overflow_items:
                rows_html += (
                    f'<details class="sinc-more">'
                    f'<summary>+{len(overflow_items)} restantes</summary>'
                    f'<div class="u-s058">'
                )
                for it in overflow_items:
                    name = it["name"]
                    count = it["count"]
                    level = it.get("level", "warning")
                    enemies = it.get("enemies", [])
                    level_color = "#e74c3c" if level == "critical" else "#f39c12"
                    level_label = "MUITO VULNERÁVEL" if level == "critical" else "VULNERÁVEL"
                    enemy_avatars = ''.join(av(e, 34, level_color) for e in enemies[:4])
                    extra_enemies = len(enemies) - 4
                    rows_html += (
                        f'<div class="u-s348">'
                        f'{av(name, 42, level_color)}'
                        f'<div class="u-s066">'
                        f'<div class="u-s347">'
                        f'<span class="fs-base u-s068">{name.split()[0]}</span>'
                        f'<span class="fs-2xs" style="padding:2px 6px;border-radius:4px;background:{level_color};color:#fff;font-weight:700;">{level_label}</span>'
                        f'<span class="fs-sm" style="color:{level_color};font-weight:600;">{count} falsos amigos</span>'
                        f'</div>'
                        f'<div class="u-s366">'
                        f'<span class="fs-2xs u-s251">Quem:</span>'
                        f'{enemy_avatars}'
                        f'{f"<span class=&quot;fs-2xs&quot; style=&quot;color:#888;&quot;>+{extra_enemies}</span>" if extra_enemies > 0 else ""}'
                        f'</div></div></div>'
                    )
                rows_html += '</div></details>'
            rows_html += '</div>'
            print(f'''<div class="info-panel" style="border-left-color:{color};">
{card_header(card["icon"], card["title"], card.get("link"), f"{total}", source_tag="📈 Composto", subtitle="Falsos amigos: dá ❤️ a quem tem score negativo contra si (queridômetro + votos + eventos). Risco de voto surpresa.")}
{rows_html}
</div>''')

        # ── 🛡️ Mais Blindados ──
        elif ctype == "blindados":
            items = card.get("items", [])
            items_all = card.get("items_all") or items
            display_limit = int(card.get("display_limit") or len(items) or 5)
            n_par = card.get("n_paredoes", 1)
            inline_items = items_all[:display_limit]
            overflow_items = items_all[display_limit:]

            rows_html = '<div class="u-s058">'
            rows_html += "".join(_render_blindado_row(it, n_par=n_par, avatar_fn=av) for it in inline_items)
            if overflow_items:
                rows_html += (
                    f'<details class="sinc-more">'
                    f'<summary>+{len(overflow_items)} restantes</summary>'
                    f'<div class="u-s058">{"".join(_render_blindado_row(it, n_par=n_par, avatar_fn=av) for it in overflow_items)}</div>'
                    f'</details>'
                )
            rows_html += '</div>'

            print(f'''<div class="info-panel" style="border-left-color:{color};">
{card_header(card["icon"], card["title"], card.get("link"), f"{n_par} paredões", source_tag="📈 Acumulado", subtitle="Participantes mais protegidos nas votações da casa. Menos paredões + mais proteções = mais blindado.")}
{rows_html}
</div>''')

        # ── 🎯 Mais Alvo ──
        elif ctype == "visados":
            items_all = card.get("items_all") or card.get("items", [])
            items_exited = card.get("items_exited", [])
            display_limit = int(card.get("display_limit") or 4)
            inline_items = items_all[:display_limit]
            overflow_items = items_all[display_limit:]
            max_hits = max((it.get("power_hits", 0) for it in items_all), default=1) or 1

            rows_html = '<div class="u-s058">'
            rows_html += "".join(
                _render_na_mira_row(it, max_hits=max_hits, avatar_fn=av, tag_labels=POWER_TAG_LABELS)
                for it in inline_items
            )
            if overflow_items:
                rows_html += (
                    f'<details class="sinc-more">'
                    f'<summary>+{len(overflow_items)} restantes</summary>'
                    f'<div class="u-s058">{"".join(_render_na_mira_row(it, max_hits=max_hits, avatar_fn=av, tag_labels=POWER_TAG_LABELS) for it in overflow_items)}</div>'
                    f'</details>'
                )
            if items_exited:
                rows_html += (
                    f'<details class="sinc-more" style="margin-top:8px;padding-top:8px;border-top:1px solid #333;">'
                    f'<summary>Mostrar eliminados ({len(items_exited)})</summary>'
                    f'<div class="u-s058">{"".join(_render_na_mira_row(it, max_hits=max_hits, avatar_fn=av, tag_labels=POWER_TAG_LABELS) for it in items_exited)}</div>'
                    f'</details>'
                )
            rows_html += '</div>'

            print(f'''<div class="info-panel" style="border-left-color:{color};">
{card_header(card["icon"], card["title"], card.get("link"), f"{card.get('total', len(items_all))} ativos", source_tag="📈 Acumulado", subtitle="Quem mais sofreu indicações, monstros, vetos e outros ataques deliberados.")}
{rows_html}
</div>''')

        # ── ✨ Nunca foi ao Paredão ──
        elif ctype == "nunca_paredao":
            items = card.get("items", [])
            items_all = card.get("items_all") or items
            items_exited = card.get("items_exited", [])
            display_limit = int(card.get("display_limit") or len(items) or 5)
            n_par = card.get("n_paredoes", 1)
            inline_items = items_all[:display_limit]
            overflow_items = items_all[display_limit:]

            def _nunca_row(it: dict) -> str:
                name = it["name"]
                name_slug = name.lower().replace(" ", "-")
                votes = it.get("votes_total", 0)
                prot = it.get("protected", 0)
                avail = it.get("available", 0)
                status = it.get("status", "active")
                is_exited = status != "active"
                border = "#27ae60"
                if is_exited:
                    name_html = f'<span class="fs-md u-s068" style="color:#888;">{name.split()[0]}</span>'
                    avatar = _avatar_html(name, AVATARS, size=42, show_name=False, border_color="#555", grayscale=True, fallback_initials=True)
                    exit_label = it.get("status_label", "")
                    exit_badge = f'<span class="fs-2xs" style="padding:1px 6px;border-radius:999px;background:#333;color:#888;">{exit_label}</span>' if exit_label else ""
                else:
                    name_html = f'<a href="#perfil-{name_slug}" class="fs-md u-s068" style="text-decoration:none;color:inherit">{name.split()[0]}</a>'
                    avatar = f'<a href="#perfil-{name_slug}" style="text-decoration:none">{av(name, 42, border)}</a>'
                    exit_badge = ""

                cnote = it.get("context_note", "")
                if cnote:
                    stats_line = f'<div class="fs-2xs" style="color:#888;">{cnote}</div>'
                else:
                    stats_line = f'<div class="fs-2xs" style="color:#888;">{votes} voto{"s" if votes != 1 else ""} recebido{"s" if votes != 1 else ""} · protegido {prot}x de {avail} elegível</div>'

                return (
                    f'<div class="u-s056" style="align-items:flex-start;">'
                    f'{avatar}'
                    f'<div class="u-s066">'
                    f'<div class="u-s059">'
                    f'{name_html}'
                    f'<span class="fs-sm" style="color:#27ae60;font-weight:700;">0 paredões</span>'
                    f'</div>'
                    f'{stats_line}'
                    f'{exit_badge}'
                    f'</div></div>'
                )

            rows_html = '<div class="u-s058">'
            rows_html += "".join(_nunca_row(it) for it in inline_items)
            if overflow_items:
                rows_html += (
                    f'<details class="sinc-more">'
                    f'<summary>+{len(overflow_items)} restantes</summary>'
                    f'<div class="u-s058">{"".join(_nunca_row(it) for it in overflow_items)}</div>'
                    f'</details>'
                )
            if items_exited:
                rows_html += (
                    f'<details class="sinc-more" style="margin-top:8px;padding-top:8px;border-top:1px solid #333;">'
                    f'<summary>Saíram sem ir ao Paredão ({len(items_exited)})</summary>'
                    f'<div class="u-s058">{"".join(_nunca_row({**it, "status": it.get("status", "exited")}) for it in items_exited)}</div>'
                    f'</details>'
                )
            rows_html += '</div>'

            context_line = card.get("context_line", "")
            print(f'''<div class="info-panel" style="border-left-color:{color};">
{card_header(card["icon"], card["title"], card.get("link"), f"{n_par} paredões", source_tag="📈 Acumulado", subtitle=context_line)}
{rows_html}
</div>''')

        # ── 🔁 Figurinha Repetida ──
        elif ctype == "figurinha_repetida":
            items = card.get("items", [])
            items_all = card.get("items_all") or items
            display_limit = int(card.get("display_limit") or len(items) or 5)
            inline_items = items_all[:display_limit]
            overflow_items = items_all[display_limit:]
            max_count = max((it.get("appearance_count", 0) for it in items_all), default=1) or 1

            def _figurinha_row(it: dict) -> str:
                name = it["name"]
                name_slug = name.lower().replace(" ", "-")
                count = it.get("appearance_count", 0)
                is_active = it.get("active", True)
                was_eliminated = it.get("was_eliminated", False)
                returned = it.get("returned", False)
                route_summary = it.get("route_summary", {})
                border = "#8e44ad" if count >= 3 else ("#e67e22" if count >= 2 else "#7f8c8d")
                bar_pct = min(100, count / max_count * 100) if max_count > 0 else 0

                if is_active:
                    name_html = f'<a href="#perfil-{name_slug}" class="fs-md u-s068" style="text-decoration:none;color:inherit">{name.split()[0]}</a>'
                    avatar = f'<a href="#perfil-{name_slug}" style="text-decoration:none">{av(name, 42, border)}</a>'
                else:
                    name_html = f'<span class="fs-md u-s068" style="color:#888;">{name.split()[0]}</span>'
                    avatar = _avatar_html(name, AVATARS, size=42, show_name=False, border_color="#555", grayscale=True, fallback_initials=True)

                count_badge = f'<span class="fs-sm" style="color:{border};font-weight:700;">{count}x</span>'
                route_badges = []
                for route, rcount in sorted(route_summary.items()):
                    route_badges.append(
                        f'<span class="fs-2xs" style="padding:1px 6px;border-radius:999px;background:#2d1b3f;color:#d9b3ff;white-space:nowrap;">{route} {rcount}x</span>'
                    )
                extra = ""
                if returned:
                    extra += '<span class="fs-2xs" style="padding:1px 6px;border-radius:999px;background:#123b2a;color:#8fe3b8;">Voltou 🔮</span>'
                if was_eliminated:
                    extra += '<span class="fs-2xs" style="padding:1px 6px;border-radius:999px;background:#5a1a1a;color:#ff9999;">Eliminado</span>'
                badges_html = " ".join(route_badges) + (" " + extra if extra else "")

                return (
                    f'<div class="u-s056" style="align-items:flex-start;">'
                    f'{avatar}'
                    f'<div class="u-s066">'
                    f'<div class="u-s059">'
                    f'{name_html}'
                    f'{count_badge}'
                    f'</div>'
                    f'<div class="u-s014">'
                    f'<div style="width:{bar_pct:.0f}%;height:100%;background:#8e44ad;border-radius:3px;"></div>'
                    f'</div>'
                    f'<div style="margin-top:3px;display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:4px;">{badges_html}</div>'
                    f'</div></div>'
                )

            active_items = [it for it in items_all if it.get("active", True)]
            eliminated_items = [it for it in items_all if not it.get("active", True)]

            rows_html = '<div class="u-s058">'
            rows_html += "".join(_figurinha_row(it) for it in active_items)
            rows_html += '</div>'
            if eliminated_items:
                rows_html += (
                    f'<details class="sinc-more" style="margin-top:8px;padding-top:8px;border-top:1px solid #333;">'
                    f'<summary>Eliminados ({len(eliminated_items)})</summary>'
                    f'<div class="u-s058">{"".join(_figurinha_row(it) for it in eliminated_items)}</div>'
                    f'</details>'
                )

            stat_line = card.get("stat_line", "")
            print(f'''<div class="info-panel" style="border-left-color:{color};">
{card_header(card["icon"], card["title"], card.get("link"), f'{len(active_items)} ativos', source_tag="📈 Acumulado", subtitle=stat_line)}
{rows_html}
</div>''')

        # ── 👑 VIP / 🍳 Xepa (separate cards) ──
        elif ctype in ("vip", "xepa"):
            items = card.get("items", [])
            is_vip = ctype == "vip"
            accent = "#f1c40f" if is_vip else "#95a5a6"
            day_key = "vip" if is_vip else "xepa"
            max_days = max((it["total"] for it in items), default=1) or 1

            rows_html = '<div class="u-s058">'
            for it in items[:5]:
                rows_html += _render_vx_row(it, day_key=day_key, accent=accent, max_days=max_days, avatar_fn=av)
            rows_html += '</div>'

            # Collapsible section for items beyond top 5
            rest = items[5:]
            if rest:
                rows_html += (
                    '<details style="margin-top:4px;">'
                    '<summary class="fs-2xs" style="color:#888;cursor:pointer;padding:4px 0;">'
                    f'+{len(rest)} restantes</summary>'
                    '<div class="u-s058">'
                )
                for it in rest:
                    rows_html += _render_vx_row(it, day_key=day_key, accent=accent, max_days=max_days, avatar_fn=av)
                rows_html += '</div></details>'

            subtitle = "Quem passou mais dias no VIP ao longo do jogo." if is_vip else "Quem passou mais dias na Xepa ao longo do jogo."
            print(f'''<div class="info-panel" style="border-left-color:{color};">
{card_header(card["icon"], card["title"], card.get("link"), source_tag="📈 Acumulado", subtitle=subtitle)}
{rows_html}
</div>''')

        # ── 📅 Context — rendered in the header, not as a card ──
        elif ctype == "context":
            pass  # handled above in section header

    # ── 💰 Saldo de Estalecas (always last card, from profiles data) ──
    saldo_card = index_data.get("saldo_card", {})
    if saldo_card:
        print(render_saldo_card(saldo_card, avatar_fn=av))

    print('</div>')  # close grid
    print("")  # terminate the raw HTML block before the next markdown section
```

```{python}
#| label: paredao-status-card
#| output: asis

paredao_card = index_data.get("paredao", {}).get("card")
if not (paredao_card and paredao_card.get("state") != "empty"):
    paredao_names = index_data.get("paredao", {}).get("names", [])
    if paredao_names:
        status_text = "Em Votação"
        status_color = "#e74c3c"
        status_icon = "🗳️"
        names_display = ", ".join(sorted(paredao_names))
        detail_html = f'<div class="fs-lg u-s022">Emparedados: <strong>{names_display}</strong></div>'
    else:
        status_text = "Aguardando formação"
        status_color = "#6c757d"
        status_icon = "⏳"
        detail_html = '<div class="fs-base u-s020">Nenhum paredão ativo no momento</div>'

    print(f'''
<div class="info-panel" style="padding: 1rem 1.2rem; margin: 1rem 0 1.5rem 0; border-left-color: {status_color}; display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 1rem;">
<div>
<div class="fs-xl u-s385">
{status_icon} Paredão: <span style="color: {status_color};">{status_text}</span>
</div>
{detail_html}
<div class="fs-base u-s217">
<a href="paredao.html" class="u-s027">Paredão atual</a> · <a href="paredoes.html" class="u-s027">Arquivo de paredões</a>
</div>
</div>
<a href="paredao.html" class="fs-base" style="background: {status_color}; color: #fff; padding: 0.5rem 1rem; border-radius: 6px; text-decoration: none; font-weight: 500; white-space: nowrap;">
Ver análise →
</a>
</div>
''')
else:
    print("<!-- paredao-status-card skipped: active card already rendered in highlights -->")
```

# Tabela Cruzada de Reações {#crosstable}

<p class="text-muted small">📸 <strong>Dado do dia</strong> — mostra apenas a coleta mais recente.</p>

Quem deu qual reação para quem. Cada célula mostra a reação que a **linha** (emissor) deu para a **coluna** (receptor).

```{python}
#| label: cross-table
#| output: asis

cross_data = index_data.get("cross_table", {})
print(make_cross_table_html(cross_data, title_suffix=latest.get("label", "")))
```

```{python}
#| label: cross-table-summary
#| output: asis

print("\n### Reações Recebidas por Participante\n")
print("<p class='text-muted small'>Ordenado por score de sentimento. Células coloridas indicam valores altos.</p>")
summary_data = index_data.get("reaction_summary", {})
print(make_reaction_summary_html(summary_data, collapsed_rows=5))
```

# Perfis Individuais {#perfis}

```{python}
#| label: profiles-intro-desc
#| output: asis
print(ANALYSIS_DESCRIPTIONS["profiles_intro"])
```

<details class="u-s433">
<summary class="info-panel u-s296">
ℹ️ Como calculamos Vulnerabilidade, Mais Alvo e Mais Agressor (clique para expandir)
</summary>
<div class="info-panel u-s456">

**🎯 Vulnerabilidade a Votos Surpresa**

```{python}
#| label: vulnerability-desc
#| output: asis
print(ANALYSIS_DESCRIPTIONS["vulnerability_long"])
```

| Badge | Critério | Significado |
|-------|----------|-------------|
| 🔴 **MUITO VULNERÁVEL** | 5+ falsos amigos | Posição crítica. Muitas pessoas que considera amigas podem votar contra sem que espere. |
| 🟠 **VULNERÁVEL** | 3-4 falsos amigos | Posição frágil. Alguns "amigos" são hostis e podem surpreender em votação. |
| 🟡 **ATENÇÃO** | 1-2 falsos amigos | Posição razoável, mas com pontos cegos. |
| 🟢 **PROTEGIDO** | 0 falsos amigos | Sem pontos cegos — sabe quem são seus aliados e inimigos. |

**🎯 Mais Alvo (power events + votos recebidos)**

Mede o quanto o participante foi alvo de eventos de poder (indicações, contragolpes, monstro, vetos) e votos da casa ao longo do jogo. **Exclui** Sincerão (participação obrigatória) e backlash (reações automáticas). Disponível em modo "Acumulado" (sem decay) e "Recente" (decay exponencial 0.85 por semana).

Faixas no perfil: 🟢 **NENHUM** (0), 🟡 **BAIXO** (< 0), 🟠 **MÉDIO** (≤ -5), 🔴 **ALTO** (≤ -10).

**⚔️ Mais Agressor (eventos deliberados outgoing)**

Mede o quanto o participante **fez escolhas hostis deliberadas** contra outros: indicações, contragolpes, monstro, vetos, mira do líder, barrado no baile, duelo de risco. **Exclui** votos (obrigatórios), Sincerão (obrigatório), backlash (automático) e punições coletivas (1 incidente → muitas edges).

Faixas no perfil: 🟢 **NENHUMA** (0), 🟡 **BAIXA** (< 0), 🟠 **MÉDIA** (≤ -4), 🔴 **ALTA** (≤ -8).

**Categorias de Relação** (baseadas no score composto, não apenas emoji):

- **✅ Aliados** — Score positivo mútuo. Nos 2 paredões, 0% dos aliados votaram contra. Votos seguros.
- **⚔️ Inimigos** — Score negativo mútuo. Votos contra esperados de ambos os lados.
- **⚠️ Falsos Amigos** — Seu score é positivo (confia), mas o deles é negativo (hostil). **PERIGO:** votam contra 2-3× mais que não-falsos amigos.
- **🗡️ Alvos Ocultos** — Seu score é negativo (hostil), mas eles confiam em você. Eles não sabem que são seus alvos.

```{python}
#| label: profiles-footer-desc
#| output: asis
print(ANALYSIS_DESCRIPTIONS["profiles_footer"])
```

**Sinais de jogo no perfil:**
- **Poderes recebidos** (benefícios e prejuízos): acontecimentos na casa que afetam o score.
- **Votos da casa recebidos**: marcados com dedo-duro quando o voto foi revelado.
- **Impacto Recebido** e **Agressividade**: filtrados para eventos deliberados (sem Sincerão/backlash).

</div>
</details>

```{python}
#| label: individual-profiles
#| output: asis

from IPython.display import display, HTML as IPyHTML

profiles = index_data.get("profiles", [])

render_actor_avatars = partial(_render_actor_avatars, avatars=AVATARS, source_icons=SOURCE_ICONS)
make_event_chips = partial(_make_event_chips, render_actor_avatars_fn=render_actor_avatars)
render_avatar_row = partial(_render_avatar_row, avatar_fn=av)

for p in profiles:
    card_html = render_profile_card(
        p,
        avatars=AVATARS,
        group_colors=GROUP_COLORS,
        avatar_fn=av,
        make_event_chips_fn=make_event_chips,
        render_avatar_row_fn=render_avatar_row,
    )
    display(IPyHTML(card_html))
```

```{python}
#| label: eliminated-section
#| output: asis

eliminated = index_data.get("eliminated", [])
if eliminated:
    status_emoji = {
        "eliminada": "🚪", "eliminado": "🚪",
        "desistente": "🏳️", "desclassificado": "⛔", "desclassificada": "⛔",
    }

    cards_html = ""
    for ex in eliminated:
        name = ex.get("name", "")
        avatar_url = ex.get("avatar", "")
        status = ex.get("status", "")
        label = ex.get("status_label", status)
        emoji = status_emoji.get(status, "❌")
        exit_date = ex.get("exit_date", "")
        reason = ex.get("exit_reason", "")
        member_of_ex = ex.get("member_of", "?")
        cor = GROUP_COLORS.get(member_of_ex, "#666")
        paredao_num = ex.get("paredao_numero")

        try:
            date_fmt = datetime.strptime(exit_date, "%Y-%m-%d").strftime("%d/%m")
        except Exception:
            date_fmt = exit_date

        subtitle = f"{emoji} {label}"
        if paredao_num:
            subtitle += f" ({paredao_num}º Paredão)"
        if date_fmt:
            subtitle += f" — {date_fmt}"

        av_img = (
            f'<img src="{avatar_url}" alt="{name}" '
            f'style="width:64px;height:64px;border-radius:50%;object-fit:cover;'
            f'border:3px solid {cor};flex-shrink:0;filter:grayscale(100%);opacity:0.7;">'
        ) if avatar_url else ""

        reason_html = f'<div class="fs-md u-s257">{reason}</div>' if reason else ""

        cards_html += f'''
<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:1rem;padding:0.8rem 1rem;
    background:#1e1e1e;border-left:4px solid {cor};border-radius:8px;margin-bottom:0.5rem;">
{av_img}
<div>
<div class="fs-lg u-s389">{name}</div>
<div class="fs-base meta-text">{subtitle}</div>
{reason_html}
</div>
</div>'''

    print(f'''
<div class="u-s081">
<h3 class="fs-xl u-s256">🖤 Participantes que saíram</h3>
{cards_html}
</div>''')
```

---

```{python}
#| label: footer-info
#| output: asis

from data_utils import BBB26_PREMIERE
_premiere_dt = datetime.strptime(BBB26_PREMIERE, "%Y-%m-%d")
_meses_pt = ["janeiro","fevereiro","março","abril","maio","junho","julho","agosto","setembro","outubro","novembro","dezembro"]
_premiere_fmt = f'{_premiere_dt.day} de {_meses_pt[_premiere_dt.month - 1]} de {_premiere_dt.year}'

# Count finalized paredões
_raw_par = load_paredoes_raw().get('paredoes', [])
_n_finalized = sum(1 for p in _raw_par if p.get('status') == 'finalizado')
_n_par_text = f' {_n_finalized} paredões finalizados.' if _n_finalized else ''

print(f'''<div class="alert alert-info" role="alert">
<strong>💡 Sobre este painel:</strong> Análise estratégica do BBB 26 combinando <strong>queridômetro</strong> (reações diárias), <strong>eventos de poder</strong> (indicações, contragolpes, monstro), <strong>votos da casa</strong>, <strong>Sincerão</strong> e <strong>dinâmicas semanais</strong>. Os scores compostos usam pesos calibrados sem decay — todos os eventos acumulam.{_n_par_text} Acompanhamento desde {_premiere_fmt}.
</div>''')
```
